title: Useful Blast Furnaces
description: Adds more recipes to blast furnaces.
body:
Adds numerous recipes to blast furnaces to make them more useful throughout the game. These include Smooth Stones, Bricks, Cracked Stones, Glass, Terracotta, and more.

Previous versions available on [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/useful-blast-furnaces/)
